## Latex Combi Hood

- SKU: 40023
- URL: https://www.eagleleather.com.au/latex-combi-hood-blackstyle.html
- Brand: Blackstyle
- Price: A$625.00
- Stock: out of stock
- Categories: Clothing, Head Gear, Hoods; Clothing, Latex, Hoods & Masks
- Color: Black
- Image: https://admin.eagleleather.com.au/media/catalog/product/l/a/latex_combi.jpg

One of the most deluxe hoods on the market, made in Germany from 0.9mm rubber.

**Features:**

- Heavy-duty back zipper

- Detachable blindfold
